title: Immersive aether portals
description: Immersive portals for aether to see through.
body:
## Important note: Aether for 1.21.1 has native Immersive Portals support since version 1.5.1, so this datapack is no longer needed.

Makes Aether portal immersive, so you can see another side of the portal through it.

Works on both [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-portals-continued) and native [(Neo)Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-portals-neoforge) versions of Immersive Portals, and on [Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals) from 1.21.1, since Aether was ported to fabric. Obviously need Aether mod.

Need to disable creation of native aether portals in ``.minecraft\config\aether-server.toml`` on 1.20.4 and newer versions, or directly in savefolder in ``.minecraft\saves\_save_folder_name_\serverconfig\aether-server.toml`` on earlier versions. Set ``"Disables Aether Portal creation" = true`` in ``[Modpack]`` section.

If you want to use dimension stacking with Aether, you also need to set ``"Disables falling into the Overworld" = true`` in ``[Modpack]`` section.
